name: 預言成真打臉
description: 女主預言車禍→車禍真的發生→男主不得不履行賭約倒立洗頭。預言類打臉的爽感在於'我早就告訴你了'的驗證快感，加上賭約兌現的喜劇效果。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: If I have a bloody accident today, not only will I not divorce you, I'll even wash my hair upside down for you to see... Watch out... ridiculous handstand hair wash. Even a dog wouldn't do that.
